mnemonics.title: Fiber Types
mnemonics.content: SMF = Single-Mode for Long Distance (Think 'Super Marathon Fiber')

mnemonics.title: Cable Shielding
mnemonics.content: UTP: Unshielded = Unprotected, STP: Shielded = Safe

visualTips.visualization: Imagine runners taking different paths in a stadium - some arrive later

analogies.analogy: Like shooting focused laser pointers through a long, narrow tunnel
